Emily started with [initial_count] dogs at her [rescue_name] center located at [address]. She welcomed [new_puppies] puppies on Thursday and [stray_count] stray dog on Friday, bringing the total to [current_total] before the weekend.

On Saturday, [adopting_families] families adopted [dogs_adopted] dogs each, reducing the population significantly. After these adoptions, Emily now has [final_count] dogs remaining in her care at the facility.

***

The math shows that adding the new arrivals to the starting number gives a temporary total before the adoptions occur. Once the families take their new pets home, the final count reflects the current status of the rescue.
